headline: What to Expect From AvalonBay Communities Stock in Q1 Earnings?
summary: AVB to report Q1 2026 results on April 27 as demand improves and supply cools. Investors watch occupancy, rents and core FFO outlook.

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Spotlight On 3 Real Estate Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: High-yielding stocks are often sought during market turbulence; Benzinga provides latest analyst ratings for dividend-paying stocks. In times of market uncertainty, investors turn to high-yielding stocks. Benzinga offers latest analyst ratings for dividend-paying stocks.
